mapper.insert: INSERT INTO vibrating_wire_data (sensor_id, device_no, channel_no, frequency, temperature, tension, strain_value, collect_time, create_time, deleted) VALUES (#{sensorId}, #{deviceNo}, #{channelNo}, #{frequency}, #{temperature}, #{tension}, #{strainValue}, #{collectTime}, NOW(), 0)
mapper.select: SELECT sensor_id AS sensorId, device_no AS deviceNo, channel_no AS channelNo, frequency AS frequency, temperature AS temperature, tension AS tension, strain_value AS strainValue, collect_time AS collectTime FROM vibrating_wire_data WHERE sensor_id = #{sensorId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY collect_time DESC LIMIT 1
